beIN SPORTS EN 1.original_title: Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.title: Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Bayer Leverkusen in the UEFA Champions League, with their one victory over them coming on the only occasion they have hosted the German side: 4-1 at Highbury in February 2002. When avoiding defeat away from home in the first leg, Arsenal have progressed from 17 of their 20 two-legged knockout stage ties in major European competition. The latest of those eliminations did come under Mikel Arteta, however, losing on penalties to Sporting CP in the UEFA Europa League round of 16 in 2022-23.

Real Madrid are looking to eliminate Manchester City from the UEFA Champions League knockout stages for a fifth time ; only Bayern Munich have been eliminated by an opponent on more than five occasions in the knockout stages of the competition.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.original_title: Bayern München vs Atalanta - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.title: Bayern München vs Atalanta - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc: Bayern Munich lost 2-1 at home to Internazionale in last season’s UEFA Champions League quarter-final – only once have they lost consecutive home games against Italian sides in the competition, doing so in October 2002/November 2004 against Milan and Juventus. Atalanta have lost just two of their seven away games against German teams in all competitions, with both defeats coming at Borussia Dortmund. This is their first ever visit to Bayern Munich.

beIN SPORTS EN 1.desc: Barcelona have won both of their previous home games against Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League, beating them 1-0 in November 1997 and 3-1 in December 2002. Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertoto Cup. The only exception in this run was a 3-0 win at Mallorca in the 2003-04 UEFA Cup.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Sporting CP vs Bodø / Glimt - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Sporting CP vs Bodø / Glimt - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: With a three-goal deficit from the first leg, Sporting CP are facing what would be just the third time a Portuguese side have been eliminated by a Norwegian opponent in the knockout stages of a major European competition – previously União de Leiria v Molde  and Sporting CP themselves v Viking. Bodø/Glimt have a 100% record against Portuguese sides in European competition, with their first leg triumph over Sporting CP being the third different opponent they have beaten.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against Bayer Leverkusen in the UEFA Champions League, with their one victory over them coming on the only occasion they have hosted the German side: 4-1 at Highbury in February 2002. When avoiding defeat away from home in the first leg, Arsenal have progressed from 17 of their 20 two-legged knockout stage ties in major European competition. The latest of those eliminations did come under Mikel Arteta, however, losing on penalties to Sporting CP in the UEFA Europa League round of 16 in 2022-23.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Manchester City vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Manchester City vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Manchester City have lost three of their last four UEFA Champions League games against Real Madrid, as many defeats as they suffered against them through their first 12 meetings in the competition. Real Madrid are looking to eliminate Manchester City from the UEFA Champions League knockout stages for a fifth time ; only Bayern Munich have been eliminated by an opponent on more than five occasions in the knockout stages of the competition.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Chelsea vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Chelsea vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Chelsea are winless in their last five UEFA Champions League games against Paris SG ; their joint-longest winless run against an opponent in the competition. Paris SG are unbeaten in their last five games against English teams in the UEFA Champions League, and could go six in a row without defeat against them in the competition for the first time here.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Barcelona vs Newcastle United- UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Barcelona vs Newcastle United- UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Barcelona have won both of their previous home games against Newcastle United in the UEFA Champions League, beating them 1-0 in November 1997 and 3-1 in December 2002. Newcastle have lost five of their six away games against Spanish sides in all competitions, with this their first since a 2-1 loss at Deportivo de La Coruña in the 2005 UEFA Intertoto Cup. The only exception in this run was a 3-0 win at Mallorca in the 2003-04 UEFA Cup.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Bayern München vs Atalanta - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Bayern München vs Atalanta - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Bayern Munich lost 2-1 at home to Internazionale in last season’s UEFA Champions League quarter-final – only once have they lost consecutive home games against Italian sides in the competition, doing so in October 2002/November 2004 against Milan and Juventus. Atalanta have lost just two of their seven away games against German teams in all competitions, with both defeats coming at Borussia Dortmund. This is their first ever visit to Bayern Munich.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Liverpool vs Galatasaray - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Liverpool vs Galatasaray - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Having been unbeaten in their first three UEFA Champions League meetings with Galatasaray, Liverpool have now lost their last three against the Turkish side, though all three defeats have come away from home. Galatasaray have won just one of their 12 away games against English teams in all competitions, winning 3-2 at Manchester United in October 2023.

beIN SPORTS 1.original_title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.title: Tottenham Hotspur vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Round of 16 - 2nd leg
beIN SPORTS 1.desc: Tottenham have won just three of their 16 meetings with Spanish sides in all European competition. The first of those was against Atlético Madrid, beating them 5-1 in the 1963 UEFA Cup Winners Cup final. Having lost just one of their first six UEFA Champions League away games against English sides, Atlético Madrid have now lost five of their last six visits to England. However, all three of their away wins against Premier League teams in the competition have come in the knockout stages.
